titles.text: Simple 1500 Series Vol. 34: The Quiz Bangumi
Simpel 1500 シリーズ Vol. 34 The クイズ番組

descriptions.text: Simple 1500 Series vol. 34: The Quiz Bangumi is a quiz game that features 4 different themes and 12 different characters for the player to choose. The game features more than 6000 different questions and can be player with up to 4 human players at the same time using the multitap device.
